email_address.description: Renamed from raw emailAddress; also this stream's primary key. This is a single-record, unpaginated mailbox-identity resource (one row per sync -- there is exactly one profile per authenticated user_id).

history_id.description: Renamed from raw historyId; the current mailbox historyId snapshot at profile-read time. Google publishes historyId as a uint64-formatted STRING, matching the history stream's own id field type.
